issues.message: Hook listed in data file but NOT exported from hooks/index.ts. It is an internal hook used only by MarkdownRenderer. Should be removed from public hooks list.
Hook listed in data file but NOT exported from hooks/index.ts. It is an internal hook used only by MarkdownRenderer. Should be removed from public hooks list.
Missing prop 'filterFunction' (type: ChatFilterFunction). HistoryProps extends HistoryListProps (minus onChatClick) which includes filterFunction as optional with default defaultChatFilter.
Missing prop 'size' (type: InputControlSize, default: 'm'). HistoryProps extends HistoryListProps which includes size prop for the underlying List component.

Data file lists props individually but actual ThinkingMessageProps = DOMProps & QAProps & ThinkingMessageContentData. The 'style' prop comes from DOMProps, not ThinkingMessageContentData. Technically accurate props but misrepresents origin.

Data file says 'visible' prop has default 'true'. In vendor source, visible is declared optional with no explicit default in the component. The default-true behavior is only enforced in MessageList (visible !== false check), not in RatingBlock itself.
InlineCitation directory exists in vendor atoms with re-export in atoms/index.ts but exports nothing (export {}). Data file correctly omits it. Vendor has a dead re-export.
InputContext directory exists in vendor molecules with re-export in molecules/index.ts but exports nothing (export {}). Data file correctly omits it. Vendor has a dead re-export.
Data file content type 'TAssistantMessageContent<TContent>' is correct but generic parameter TContent defaults to 'never'. Could note the default for clarity.

Description mentions Disclaimer and History integration but does not mention useChatContainer hook which manages significant internal state (history open/close, base actions resolution, chat content view).
